title: Changing a task's status to Done on the My Work page no longer leads to the item automatically being removed from the page
excerpt: Changing a task’s status to Done on the My Work page (in Status View) no longer leads to the item automatically being removed from the page. It has worked for 2 years like this for me and my colleagues and then last week…

posts.author: cstayou (Christine Stay)
posts.cookedHtml: Changing a task’s status to Done on the My Work page (in Status View) no longer leads to the item automatically being removed from the page. It has worked for 2 years like this for me and my colleagues and then last week, it changed. Only gets rid of the “Done” items if you completely refresh with website, which is annoying to do.

posts.author: trinja (Trinity Doyle)
posts.cookedHtml: This is happening to me as well. Troubleshooted with Monday help team and they haven’t figured it out yet. Very annoying!
